creator: wollman@tsornin.BostonRadio.org
text:
The current version of Rails is 2.3.5.  Ports only has 2.3.4, which is
not good enough to run the current version of typo.

Fix: 

Update whichever components of Rails are needed to get to 2.3.5.
How-To-Repeat: 
Download typo.  Read README file.  Become sad.
